Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.domain
  2. KeysetScrollPosition

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.domain.KeysetScrollPosition

Packages that use KeysetScrollPosition
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.domain
Central domain abstractions especially to be used in combination with the Repository abstraction.

  • Uses of KeysetScrollPosition in org.springframework.data.domain

    Methods in org.springframework.data.domain that return KeysetScrollPosition
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    KeysetScrollPosition
    KeysetScrollPosition.backward()
    Returns a KeysetScrollPosition based on the same keyset and scrolling backward.
    static KeysetScrollPosition
    ScrollPosition.backward(Map<String,?> keys)
    Creates a new ScrollPosition from a key set scrolling backward.
    KeysetScrollPosition
    KeysetScrollPosition.forward()
    Returns a KeysetScrollPosition based on the same keyset and scrolling forward.
    static KeysetScrollPosition
    ScrollPosition.forward(Map<String,?> keys)
    Creates a new ScrollPosition from a key set scrolling forward.
    static KeysetScrollPosition
    ScrollPosition.keyset()
    Creates a new initial ScrollPosition to start scrolling using keyset-queries.
    static KeysetScrollPosition
    ScrollPosition.of(Map<String,?> keys, ScrollPosition.Direction direction)
    Creates a new ScrollPosition from a key set and ScrollPosition.Direction.
    KeysetScrollPosition
    KeysetScrollPosition.reverse()
    Returns a new KeysetScrollPosition with the direction reversed.
